name: Greek Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine salad oil, vinegar, egg, 1/2 of the anchovy fillets, celery, small onion, carrot, radishes, capers, garlic, sugar, oregano, paprika, salt, and pepper.
2. Cover and blend at high speed until smooth, about 2 minutes.
3. Serve over salad greens with Feta cheese, cauliflowerettes, tomato wedges, green bell peppers, chopped green onions, ripe olives, and the remaining anchovies.
